description: Hosted D-Bus system bus, real daemon: avahi owns org.freedesktop.Avahi, monitor consumer roundtrips its API

setup.env: PV_CONTROL_REMOTE=0 PV_LOG_CAPTURE_DMESG=0 PV_UPDATER_GOALS_TIMEOUT=10 PV_UPDATER_COMMIT_DELAY=5 PV_SECUREBOOT_MODE=disabled PV_WDT_MODE=disabled PV_DEBUG_SSH=0 PV_LOG_DIR_MAXSIZE=2147483647
